subject: [PATCH pynfs 09/13] server41tests: test COPY within same file

2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch adds a new test case to the server41tests suite, which tests the COPY operation within the same file by writing data at offset 0 and copying it to offset 8192, then verifying that the copied data matches the original. The test is designed to ensure that the COPY operation works correctly even when the source and destination offsets are non-overlapping.
